description: Single filer, one W-2 for $65,000 with $7,500 federal withheld, standard deduction, no dependents. Hand-computed from TY2025 OBBBA-adjusted constants.
authority: IRS tax tables used for taxable income < $100k; bracket formula used as cross-check
CP4 tenforty verification locked Federal income tax at 5755 for this scenario

hand_check.tax_tables_delta: IRS tax tables use $50 midpoints, so $49,250 lands in the bracket centered at $49,275. 10% * 11925 + 12% * 36550 + 22% * 800 = 1192.50 + 4386.00 + 176.00 = 5754.50, rounds to 5755
